contents:
Local Ltac unit_counit_of_t :=
      repeat
        match goal with
          | _ => split
          | _ => intro
          | _ => progress auto with morphism
          | _ => progress simpl
          | _ => rewrite !composition_of
          | [ |- context[components_of ?T] ]
            => (try_associativity_quick simpl rewrite <- (commutes T));
              try_associativity_quick
                progress
                rewrite ?unit_counit_equation_1, ?unit_counit_equation_2
          | [ |- context[components_of ?T] ]
            => (try_associativity_quick simpl rewrite (commutes T));
              try_associativity_quick
                progress
                rewrite ?unit_counit_equation_1, ?unit_counit_equation_2
          | _ => progress path_induction
        end.

Definition adjunction_unit__of__adjunction_unit_counit
               C D F G (A : @AdjunctionUnitCounit C D F G)
    : AdjunctionUnit F G.

goals.conclusion: AdjunctionUnit F G
AdjunctionUnit F G

forall (c : C) (d : D) (f : morphism C c (G _0 d)%object),
Contr {g : morphism D (F _0 c)%object d & G _1 g o unit A c = f}
Contr {g : morphism D (F _0 c)%object d & G _1 g o unit A c = f}

forall x y : {g : morphism D (F _0 c)%object d & G _1 g o unit A c = f},
x = y
(proj1; proj2) = (proj0; proj3)

hypotheses.type: G _1 proj1 o unit A c = f
G _1 proj0 o unit A c = f

goals.conclusion:
{p : (proj1; proj2).1 = (proj0; proj3).1 &
transport (fun g : morphism D (F _0 c)%object d => G _1 g o unit A c = f) p
  (proj1; proj2).2 =
(proj0; proj3).2}

hypotheses.type: G _1 proj1 o unit A c = f
G _1 proj0 o unit A c = f

goals.conclusion: (proj1; proj2).1 = (proj0; proj3).1

hypotheses.type: G _1 proj1 o unit A c = f
G _1 proj0 o unit A c = f

goals.conclusion: proj1 = proj0

hypotheses.type: G _1 proj1 o unit A c = f
G _1 proj0 o unit A c = f

contents:
Definition adjunction_counit__of__adjunction_unit_counit
               C D F G (A : @AdjunctionUnitCounit C D F G)
    : AdjunctionCounit F G
      := adjunction_counit__op__adjunction_unit
           (adjunction_unit__of__adjunction_unit_counit A^op).

Ltac to_unit_counit_nt helper commutes_tac :=
      simpl;
      intros;
      apply helper;
      repeat match goal with
               | _ => reflexivity
               | _ => rewrite !composition_of
               | _ => progress
                        rewrite ?identity_of, ?left_identity, ?right_identity
               | [ |- context[?x.1] ]
                 => try_associativity_quick simpl rewrite x.2
               | [ |- context[components_of ?T] ]
                 => simpl_do_clear commutes_tac (commutes T)
             end.

Lemma counit_natural_transformation__of__adjunction_unit_helper
            (A : AdjunctionUnit F G)
            s d (m : morphism D s d)
            (eta := A.1)
            (eps := fun X => (@center _ (A.2 (G X) X 1)).1)
      : G _1 (eps d o F _1 (G _1 m)) o eta (G s) = G _1 m
        -> G _1 (m o eps s) o eta (G s) = G _1 m
        -> eps d o F _1 (G _1 m) = m o eps s.

goals.conclusion:
G _1 (eps d o F _1 (G _1 m)) o eta (G _0 s)%object = G _1 m ->
G _1 (m o eps s) o eta (G _0 s)%object = G _1 m ->
eps d o F _1 (G _1 m) = m o eps s

hypotheses.body:
fun X : D =>
(center
   {g : morphism D (F _0 (G _0 X))%object X &
   G _1 g o A.1 (G _0 X)%object = 1}).1
hypotheses.type: forall X : D, morphism D (F _0 (G _0 X))%object X

goals.conclusion:
G _1 (eps d o F _1 (G _1 m)) o eta (G _0 s)%object = G _1 m ->
G _1 (m o eps s) o eta (G _0 s)%object = G _1 m ->
eps d o F _1 (G _1 m) = m o eps s

hypotheses.body:
fun X : D =>
(center
   {g : morphism D (F _0 (G _0 X))%object X &
   G _1 g o A.1 (G _0 X)%object = 1}).1
hypotheses.type: forall X : D, morphism D (F _0 (G _0 X))%object X

goals.conclusion: eps d o F _1 (G _1 m) = m o eps s

hypotheses.body:
fun X1 : D =>
(center
   {g : morphism D (F _0 (G _0 X1))%object X1 &
   G _1 g o A.1 (G _0 X1)%object = 1}).1
hypotheses.type: forall X1 : D, morphism D (F _0 (G _0 X1))%object X1
G _1 (eps d o F _1 (G _1 m)) o eta (G _0 s)%object = G _1 m
G _1 (m o eps s) o eta (G _0 s)%object = G _1 m

contents:
Definition counit_natural_transformation__of__adjunction_unit
                 (A : AdjunctionUnit F G)
      : NaturalTransformation (F o G) 1.

goals.conclusion: NaturalTransformation (F o G) 1
NaturalTransformation (F o G) 1

contents:
refine (Build_NaturalTransformation
                  (F o G) 1
                  (fun d => (@center _ (A.2 (G d) d 1)).1)
                  _).

goals.conclusion:
forall (s d : D) (m : morphism D s d),
(center
   {g : morphism D (F _0 (G _0 d))%object d &
   G _1 g o A.1 (G _0 d)%object = 1}).1
o (F o G) _1 m =
1 _1 m
o (center
     {g : morphism D (F _0 (G _0 s))%object s &
     G _1 g o A.1 (G _0 s)%object = 1}).1

contents:
abstract (
            to_unit_counit_nt
              counit_natural_transformation__of__adjunction_unit_helper
              ltac:(fun H => try_associativity_quick rewrite <- H)
          ).

Definition zig__of__adjunction_unit
                 (A : AdjunctionUnit F G)
                 (Y : C)
                 (eta := A.1)
                 (eps := fun X => (@center _ (A.2 (G X) X 1)).1)
      : G _1 (eps (F Y) o F _1 (eta Y)) o eta Y = eta Y
        -> eps (F Y) o F _1 (eta Y) = 1.

goals.conclusion:
G _1 (eps (F _0 Y)%object o F _1 (eta Y)) o eta Y = eta Y ->
eps (F _0 Y)%object o F _1 (eta Y) = 1

hypotheses.body:
fun X : D =>
(center
   {g : morphism D (F _0 (G _0 X))%object X &
   G _1 g o A.1 (G _0 X)%object = 1}).1
hypotheses.type: forall X : D, morphism D (F _0 (G _0 X))%object X

goals.conclusion:
G _1 (eps (F _0 Y)%object o F _1 (eta Y)) o eta Y = eta Y ->
eps (F _0 Y)%object o F _1 (eta Y) = 1

hypotheses.body:
fun X : D =>
(center
   {g : morphism D (F _0 (G _0 X))%object X &
   G _1 g o A.1 (G _0 X)%object = 1}).1
hypotheses.type: forall X : D, morphism D (F _0 (G _0 X))%object X

goals.conclusion: eps (F _0 Y)%object o F _1 (eta Y) = 1

hypotheses.body:
fun X0 : D =>
(center
   {g : morphism D (F _0 (G _0 X0))%object X0 &
   G _1 g o A.1 (G _0 X0)%object = 1}).1
hypotheses.type: forall X0 : D, morphism D (F _0 (G _0 X0))%object X0
G _1 (eps (F _0 Y)%object o F _1 (eta Y)) o eta Y = eta Y

goals.conclusion: G _1 1 o A.1 Y = A.1 Y

hypotheses.body:
fun X0 : D =>
(center
   {g : morphism D (F _0 (G _0 X0))%object X0 &
   G _1 g o A.1 (G _0 X0)%object = 1}).1
hypotheses.type: forall X0 : D, morphism D (F _0 (G _0 X0))%object X0
G _1 (eps (F _0 Y)%object o F _1 (eta Y)) o eta Y = eta Y

goals.conclusion: G _1 1 o A.1 Y = A.1 Y

hypotheses.body:
fun X0 : D =>
(center
   {g : morphism D (F _0 (G _0 X0))%object X0 &
   G _1 g o A.1 (G _0 X0)%object = 1}).1
hypotheses.type: forall X0 : D, morphism D (F _0 (G _0 X0))%object X0
G _1 (eps (F _0 Y)%object o F _1 (eta Y)) o eta Y = eta Y

contents:
Definition adjunction_unit_counit__of__adjunction_unit
                 (A : AdjunctionUnit F G)
      : AdjunctionUnitCounit F G.

goals.conclusion: AdjunctionUnitCounit F G
AdjunctionUnitCounit F G

(center
   {g : morphism D (F _0 (G _0 (F _0 Y)))%object (F _0 Y)%object &
   G _1 g o A.1 (G _0 (F _0 Y))%object = 1}).1
o F _1 (A.1 Y) = 1

contents:
abstract (to_unit_counit_nt
                    zig__of__adjunction_unit
                    ltac:(fun H => try_associativity_quick rewrite <- H)).

Definition adjunction_unit_counit__of__adjunction_counit
               C D F G (A : @AdjunctionCounit C D F G)
    : AdjunctionUnitCounit F G
      := ((adjunction_unit_counit__of__adjunction_unit
             (adjunction_unit__op__adjunction_counit__inv A))^op)%adjunction.
